title: Clickrail Electric Train Set, DIY Cube Track Building Set,Flexible Race Track, Magnetic Train Track Set for Kids, Gravity-Defying Motorized Car & Rail Cube Building Toy (123 Pcs)
features: VERSATILE SET: Includes 51-123 pieces with colourful magnetic cube tracks, motorised train cars, and track accessories for endless building possibilities
EDUCATIONAL VALUE: STEM learning toy develops spatial awareness, problem-solving skills, and creativity through hands-on construction play
TRACK FEATURES: Magnetic connections allow for gravity-defying vertical and curved track configurations, creating exciting racing experiences
SET CONTENTS: Comes with motorised trains, curved and straight track pieces, decorative signage, support pillars, and a sturdy base for stability
AGE SUITABILITY: Perfect for children aged 3 years and above, offering both independent and collaborative play opportunities
description: Product description Transform playtime into an exciting engineering adventure with this innovative DIY Cube Track Building Set! Available in sets of 51-123 pieces, this versatile magnetic train track system lets children create gravity-defying routes using colourful construction blocks. The set includes a motorised train car that zooms along custom-built tracks, bringing designs to life. Each cube connects magnetically, allowing young builders to construct vertical climbs, thrilling descents, and creative curves. The set features detailed track accessories like traffic lights, station signs, and support pillars to enhance the railway experience. Perfect for children aged 3 and above, this STEM learning toy encourages spatial thinking, problem-solving skills, and creative expression. The modular design offers endless possibilities for track configurations, keeping children engaged for hours as they experiment with different layouts. Whether building simple circuits or complex multi-level tracks, this construction set delivers an engaging blend of education and entertainment. Makes an excellent gift choice for aspiring young engineers and creative minds. Directions Connect The Colourful Cube Pieces Following The Track Layout Guide. Attach Traffic Signs And Supports Where Indicated. Insert Batteries And Place Motorized Train On Track. Safety Warning No warning applicable See more
